---
description: "Instructions for developing the calculator web app using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript"
---

# Calculator Development Guidelines

- Use semantic HTML elements (e.g., `<main>`, `<section>`, `<button>`) for the calculator interface to improve accessibility.
- Structure the HTML with a clear hierarchy: display area, button grid, etc.
- Use CSS Grid or Flexbox for layout; avoid tables for non-tabular data.
- Ensure the calculator is responsive and works on different screen sizes.
- Add keyboard support for accessibility (e.g., number keys, operators).
- Write clean, readable JavaScript code with comments for complex logic.
- Test the calculator with various inputs, including edge cases like division by zero.
